debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
ω : WignerSpace n
⊢ (if h : i = j then @ω ⟨(i, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n i⟩
    else
      if h : i < j then @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n i j ⋯⟩
      else @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n i j (wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n i j ⋯ ⋯)⟩) =
    if h : j = i then @ω ⟨(j, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n j⟩
    else
      if h : j < i then @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n j i ⋯⟩
      else @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n j i (wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n j i ⋯ ⋯)⟩

proof: simpa [wignerMatrixEntryFunction] using (wignerMatrixEntryFunctionSymmetric (n := n) ω (i := i) (j := j))
failed_attempts:
simpa [wignerMatrixEntryFunction] by
    by_cases h1 : i = j
    · subst h1; simp
    · have h2 : j ≠ i := ne_comm.mp h1
      by_cases hij : i < j
      · have hji : ¬ j < i := by exact not_lt_of_lt hij
        simp [h1, h2, hij, hji]
      · have hji : j < i := by
          have hij' : i > j := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hij) h1
          simpa [gt_iff_lt] using hij'
        have hji' : ¬ j = i := h2
        have hij'' : ¬ i < j := hij
        simp [h1, h2, hij'', hji]

simpa [wignerMatrixEntryFunction] by
    by_cases h : i = j
    · subst h; simp
    · have h' : ¬ j = i := by simpa [eq_comm] using h
      by_cases hij : i < j
      · have hji : ¬ j < i := not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt hij)
        simp [h, h', hij, hji]
      · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hij) (Ne.symm h)
        simp [h, h', hij, hji, not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt hji)]
